files.content:
import type { TableBuilderConfig, TableRow } from "../../components/tables/types";

export interface Row extends TableRow {
  "rep": string;
  "region": string;
  "deals": number;
  "revenue": number;
  "quota": number;
}


export const tableConfig: TableBuilderConfig = {
  "title": "Sales Reps Performance",
  "description": "KPI dashboard with expandable per-rep stats.",
  "direction": "ltr",
  "density": "comfortable",
  "pageSize": 8,
  "sortMode": "client",
  "paginationMode": "client",
  "expandableLayout": "stats",
  "expandableIconStyle": "arrow",
  "expandableIconPosition": "first",
  "paginationLayout": "compact",
  "pageSizeOptions": [
    5,
    10,
    20,
    50,
    100
  ],
  "virtualRowHeight": 44,
  "virtualMaxHeight": 520,
  "enableSearch": true,
  "enablePagination": true,
  "enableRowSelection": true,
  "enableDnD": false,
  "enableColumnVisibility": false,
  "enableExport": true,
  "enableStriped": false,
  "enableHover": true,
  "enableBordered": false,
  "enableStickyHeader": false,
  "enableExpandableRows": true,
  "enableInlineEdit": false,
  "enableBulkActions": false,
  "enableColumnResize": false,
  "enableMultiSort": true,
  "enableColumnFilters": true,
  "enableRowGrouping": false,
  "enableAggregation": true,
  "enableFooter": true,
  "columns": [
    {
      "id": "c1",
      "key": "rep",
      "label": "Sales Rep",
      "type": "avatar",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left"
    },
    {
      "id": "c2",
      "key": "region",
      "label": "Region",
      "type": "badge",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left",
      "badgeVariants": {
        "NA": "default",
        "EU": "secondary",
        "APAC": "outline",
        "LATAM": "default"
      }
    },
    {
      "id": "c3",
      "key": "deals",
      "label": "Deals",
      "type": "number",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": false,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "center",
      "aggregation": "sum",
      "footerLabel": "Total"
    },
    {
      "id": "c4",
      "key": "revenue",
      "label": "Revenue",
      "type": "currency",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": false,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "right",
      "format": "$",
      "aggregation": "sum",
      "footerLabel": "Total"
    },
    {
      "id": "c5",
      "key": "quota",
      "label": "Quota %",
      "type": "progress",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": false,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "center"
    },
    {
      "id": "c6",
      "key": "actions",
      "label": "",
      "type": "actions",
      "sortable": false,
      "filterable": false,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "right"
    }
  ]
} as const satisfies TableBuilderConfig;
